dimensions.label: 学生数据持久化与隐私

gates.name: Production identity and email
gates.requirement: Registration, sign-in and password reset now use a fail-closed Turnstile token contract; staging/production require a runtime site key. The Supabase deployment workflow applies the server-side secret, exact production origin and confirmation/reset allowlist, mandatory email confirmation, 10-character lower/upper/digit password policy and refresh-token rotation through the Management API, then checks the effective configuration. Before Beta, bind the real production Supabase project and trusted domain, configure custom SMTP and real Turnstile hostname keys, run the apply/check command there, and verify confirmation, password recovery, sign-out, expired-token and rate-limit journeys on the production domain.

gates.name: Durable private learning data
gates.requirement: The authenticated adapter, exam-scoped background profiles, complete practice history, historical-result reopening, atomic Guest claim, idempotent events and cross-tenant denial are locally verified. Failed saves retain answers with explicit retry and block result navigation until persistence. Student-issued teacher/parent Grants now separately control progress, exact responses, annotations, plans and assignments by exam and expiry; local database tests prove parent/teacher positive paths, outsider denial, student-visible audit and immediate revocation. Deploy all migrations to the production Supabase project and verify account history, collaboration, failure/retry and cross-device recovery with separate real accounts before Beta.

gates.name: Minor privacy and user rights
gates.requirement: Student-readable privacy, authenticated schema-v4 JSON export, password-confirmed account deletion, student-visible collaboration audit, immediate Grant revocation and a privacy-safe feedback route are locally verified. Controller/contact details, lawful bases, DPIA, exact retention/backups, formal data correction/restriction/objection/complaints workflows, production two-account Grant UAT and legal review remain before Beta.

gates.name: Production deployment and recovery
gates.requirement: Immutable runtime-configured web images, CI gates, a full local database recovery drill and a 100-user invite/profile/start/submit capacity check are verified. Deployment runtime verification rejects empty/placeholder/wrong-project Supabase or Turnstile values, compares runtime and version identities, calls hosted Auth health/settings with the publishable key, and requires email confirmation. A separate read-only production bootstrap preflight checks the Mantou repository, four workflows, staging/production GitHub Environment existence, required secret names, public HTTPS origins, production approval protection, Docker, and whether the current SHA is clean and pushed; it never reads secret values and keeps five manual production gates explicit. A separate default-dry-run apply path validates both public origins, all eight secret source names and the production reviewer, requires an exact confirmation, performs zero writes when any source is absent, pipes secret values through stdin and finishes with the independent read-only gate. Its 2026-07-19 external run found both GitHub Environments absent, so eight environment secrets, two origins and the production reviewer are not configured; the new automation has not been executed against real infrastructure. A scheduled workflow is ready to run remote verification plus desktop/phone public and Guest learning journeys twice daily without creating accounts or consuming invites. Before Beta, create approved staging and production deployments, configure the missing control plane, add external monitoring/alert recipients, and complete a managed Supabase restore-to-new-project drill with recorded RPO/RTO.

gates.name: Real invite-bound material
gates.requirement: TMUA full access now delivers a real six-week plan, and tmua-deep-review delivers a source-audited 20-question Specimen Paper 1 worked review; locked, entitled, second-user and revoked states are locally verified. Database issuance rejects every active package that lacks a real published entitled resource, and the account/completion pages resolve the package to every openable product through the same versioned catalog instead of a hard-coded full-access branch. A founder-approved invite-operator role now lets a Bingbing account list only published packages, issue finite codes, list and revoke only its own codes, and see a private audit trail without student identities or learner-data privileges; grant/revocation, normal-student denial, second-operator isolation, plaintext-code exclusion, service-only bounded global audit and real HTTP issue/revoke are locally verified. The private own-record operations page is now locally implemented with signed-out, normal-student, issue, one-time-code, list and revoke states under independent tests. Student-facing invite, account and Bingbing copy names only published assets rather than promising an unavailable complete mock. Draft-only ESAT, TARA, LNAT and UCAT packages therefore cannot be promised. Before Beta, complete real-device operations UAT, bootstrap Bingbing's verified production account with MFA, deploy the migrations and repeat the complete permission/recovery journey on the real domain.

gates.name: TMUA native practice
gates.requirement: All 18 archived TMUA papers are natively usable online with validated source and answer mappings. A separate 8-question, 30-minute Mantou-original starting diagnostic is also natively usable without consuming an archived paper; it reports only factual raw results until independent mathematics review and student timing calibration are complete.

gates.name: Multi-exam content depth
gates.requirement: TMUA now has versioned CAIE/Pearson/IB/AP zero-token curriculum mapping, an independently verified curriculum source registry and an 8-question/30-minute Mantou-original starting diagnostic that does not consume archived papers. All five ESAT modules have ten-question Mantou-original native teaching previews plus separate 27-question/40-minute Mantou-original full mocks covering M1-M7, MM1-MM8, P1-P7, C1-C17 and B1-B11; Mathematics 1/2 plus Physics/Chemistry/Biology also have profile-aware in-site Review Notes covering all 50 top-level units. TARA has a ten-question starter plus separate 22-question/40-minute Critical Thinking and Problem Solving full mocks covering all seven and three official ability families, for 54 original online reasoning questions in total; it also has a three-prompt autosaved Writing Task and profile-first Review Notes covering four modules and 21 units. LNAT now has a three-passage/twelve-question Section A starter plus a separate complete-structure 12-passage/42-question/95-minute original mock, a three-prompt autosaved Section B and profile-first Notes covering four reading, writing, EAL and pacing modules with 21 units. All four UCAT modules have native original previews and separate complete-structure mocks: Verbal Reasoning has 11 passages/44 questions/22 minutes, Decision Making has 35 questions/37 minutes with six five-statement items, Quantitative Reasoning has nine datasets/36 questions/26 minutes with every key independently recalculated, and Situational Judgement has 21 scenarios/69 questions/26 minutes split across 30 appropriateness ratings, 30 importance ratings and nine most/least pairs. UCAT original online practice now totals 224 questions. SJT reports only Mantou raw points, including adjacent rating credit and exact-pair most/least scoring; it does not claim an official Band. Profile-first Notes cover VR, DM, QR, SJT and tools/pacing in five modules with 25 units. The five non-TMUA Notes now also have same-source A4 teaching-preview editions totalling 79 pages, with source/output/public hashes, embedded-font licensing and all-page render inspection. The product release audit tracks all 41 catalog entries: all 40 public products pass their automated claims, while 0/40 currently pass the closed-Beta content gate. The 68 deduplicated manual review groups are assigned to 25 academic/bilingual/rights checks, 12 student-comprehension or timing calibrations and 31 device/accessibility reviews. Each now has an owner role, product versions, routes, source-artifact count and a SHA-256 fingerprint derived from current product evidence and feature-claim artifacts. The private review ledger requires qualified privacy-safe reviewer references, independence, attestation and hashed local evidence; stale or changes-requested decisions fail closed. No human approval has been invented, so the closed-Beta count remains 0/40 until real reviewers complete those tasks. Official research assets remain internal and not publishable. Complete those named reviews, fine-grained chapters, diagnostic calibration, calibrated human writing feedback and independent UK medical/dental professional review of the SJT content; do not publish empty practice promises or official score/Band claims.

gates.name: Feedback and support operations
gates.requirement: The privacy-safe question/technical/account/security feedback route, deterministic P1-P4 routing, tenant isolation, private audit trail and content-correction runbook are locally verified. Before Beta, assign primary/backup owners, connect production alerts and rehearse privacy, login and source-backed correction cases in staging.

gates.name: Responsive and accessible journey
gates.requirement: Chromium now runs the profile-to-deterministic-starting-point-to-practice-to-private-learning-record critical journey at phone, tablet and desktop dimensions in CI. Complete real-device Safari/Android, keyboard, screen-reader and reduced-motion UAT before Beta.

gates.name: Privacy-safe first-party funnel
gates.requirement: The browser and database record only six fixed conversion actions against a session-scoped random Journey ID. There is no account, Learner Space, email, IP, device, course, answer, URL or free-form payload linkage; anonymous/authenticated roles can only append through a validated, rate-limited, idempotent RPC. A separate service-role-granted and revocable product_funnel_viewer capability now opens /operations/funnel and returns only aggregate event and unique-Journey counts by exam and stage for 7/30/90-day windows; it does not imply invite-operator or learner-data access, and ordinary students remain denied. Before Beta, deploy both migrations to staging/production, enable MFA for the approved founder viewer, schedule the 90-day purge, complete real-device dashboard UAT, and save real-project evidence that browser roles cannot read raw rows and only the approved viewer can call the aggregate workflow.

gates.name: Student-controlled teacher and parent collaboration
gates.requirement: The local product now provides separate student Grant management, one-time collaboration-code redemption, teacher/parent workspaces, five independent scopes, exam and expiry limits, audit, schema-v4 export and immediate revocation. Forty-four dedicated pgTAP checks plus service, page, account-entry and responsive-layout tests prove positive teacher/parent actions and fail-closed cross-tenant, missing-scope, expired/revoked paths. Before Beta, deploy the migrations, require MFA for all participating accounts, perform real two-account production UAT on phone/iPad/desktop, complete keyboard and screen-reader review, and rehearse revocation while the collaborator page is open.

gates.name: Source-bound content review operations
gates.requirement: A private independently granted content-review workbench now exposes the current source-bound queue to approved reviewers without exposing raw private tables or any browser approval capability. Local server-only sync transactionally loaded 68 review groups across 40 public products for revision 2026-07-19.33; exact permissions, rollback on malformed replacement, internal product routes, SHA-256 fingerprints, filtering and unattested packet generation are covered by database, service, page and layout tests. Before Beta, sync the queue to the production project, grant only verified MFA reviewer accounts, complete ordinary-user denial plus revoke-while-open UAT, and have real qualified reviewers save evidence and record decisions through the versioned ledger. No human approval is implied, so the release gate remains 0/40.
